examples: Up and down the Madre DE Dios River, people mine for gold.
Do any of you know the movie called? The Treasure of the Sierra Madre?
Researchers have found high levels of mercury in fish caught in Madre DE Dios.
Every room faces the beautiful Banderas Bay with the scenic Sierra Madre mountain chain located in the distance.
In Tierra Caliente, a swath of remote farming valleys, separated from the coast by the Sierra Madre, La Familia definitely has a social base.
